section.heading: Annual report

content.p: The Secretary, in collaboration with State, local, public, and private entities, State rural development councils, and community-based organizations, shall prepare an annual report that contains evaluations, assessments, and performance outcomes concerning the rural community advancement programs carried out under this subchapter.

subsection.heading: Submission
subsection.chapeau: Not later than March 1 of each year, the Secretary shall—

paragraph.content: submit the report required by subsection (a) to Congress and the chief executives of the States participating in the program established under this subchapter; and
make the report available to State and local participants.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–128, title III, § 381K, as added Pub. L. 104–127, title VII, § 761, Apr. 4, 1996, 110 Stat. 1146.)
